description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation, Scalene/Memray profiling suite, and performance benchmarks for the Hansard corpus.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 19 implementation added telemetry dependency declarations, safe OpenTelemetry setup, console and JSONL file trace exporters, pipeline span instrumentation, profiling runners, docs, benchmark workflow, evidence helpers, and focused tests. Remaining external/runtime gates: run 1GB/full-corpus Scalene/Memray profiles and record full-suite validation. The fixture benchmark now runs unskipped in Pixi and is recorded in artifacts/track19/benchmark_20260624.json. The remaining full-suite and 1 GiB/full-corpus Scalene/Memray gates are recorded in external_gate_manifest.json; no local 1 GiB corpus or Windows Memray runtime is claimed.
